hero.headline: Manufacturing and industrial jobs. Filled fast, staffed right.
hero.subhead: 30 years connecting workers with electronics, warehouse, and industrial roles across 6 US markets. Local recruiters who know the work.

employers.headline:
When a shift goes uncovered,
production pays the price.
employers.body1: We help employers reduce no-shows, weak fits, retraining, and overtime with faster response, stronger screening, and local recruiters who understand the work.
employers.body2: You do not need more resumes. You need workers who show up on time, fit the role, and can work safely from day one. That is where we focus.

screening.title: Role-specific screening
screening.desc: Every candidate is screened for the job, shift, and site environment before they reach your floor.

fastResponse.title: Fast response when you need coverage
fastResponse.desc: Send the role, shift, start date, and pay range. We move quickly.

recruiters.title: Recruiters who know the work
recruiters.desc: Your team works with recruiters who understand the roles, the work environment, and what good looks like on the floor.

industries.headline: We only staff the industries we know best.
industries.subhead: A warehouse role is not an electronics role. A machine operator is not an admin temp. After 30 years in these environments, we recruit by role, shift, and floor requirements, not just availability.

electronics.title: Electronics Manufacturing Staffing
electronics.desc: PCB assembly, SMT technicians, soldering operators, QC inspectors, test technicians, AOI operators, rework technicians, and production associates.
electronics.cert: We train and certify workers in IPC-610, IPC-620, and J-STD-001.

lightIndustrial.title: Light Industrial Staffing
lightIndustrial.desc: Assemblers, machine operators, production workers, quality control, packaging, and line support.

warehouse.title: Warehouse Staffing
warehouse.desc: Picking, packing, receiving, forklift operators, shipping, inventory, and 3PL support.

supplyChain.title: Supply Chain Staffing
supplyChain.desc: Logistics coordinators, inventory control, shipping and receiving, and warehouse support staff.

administrative.title: Administrative Staffing
administrative.desc: Data entry, customer support, clerical help, and back-office operational support.

generalLabor.title: General Labor
generalLabor.desc: Short-term, temp-to-hire, and project-based labor when you need coverage without delay.

howItWorks.headline:
Three steps.
Fast fills.
Less scrambling.
howItWorks.body1: You do not need a bloated intake process. Tell us what you need, and we get to work.
howItWorks.body2: Need temp, temp-to-hire, or direct placement? We handle all three.

step1.title: Tell us what you need
step1.desc: Send the role, shift, location, start date, pay range, and any must-have requirements.

step2.title: We source and screen
step2.desc: Our recruiters pull from active local pipelines and screen for fit, reliability, and readiness.

step3.title: Workers arrive ready
step3.desc: Candidates show up prepared for the role, and we stay involved so issues get solved fast.

locations.headline:
Local recruiters.
Real market knowledge.
locations.body1: Industrial hiring is local. Pay expectations, shift preferences, commute range, and labor competition all change by market. That's why each location is supported by a local team that understands the roles, the employers, and the labor pool.
locations.body2: We recruit in-market so you get faster fills, better attendance, and fewer surprises.

bedford.label: DFW Metro
bedford.roles: Industrial, warehouse, supply chain, general labor
bedford.serving: Fort Worth · Arlington · Irving · Grand Prairie · Bedford

austin.label: Central TX
austin.serving: Austin · Round Rock · Cedar Park · Pflugerville

sanJose.label: Silicon Valley
sanJose.roles: PCB assembly, SMT, electronics manufacturing, QC
sanJose.serving: San Jose · Santa Clara · Milpitas · Fremont

testimonials.headline: What teams say.
testimonials.subhead: The right staffing partner reduces friction. The wrong one creates more of it.

review1.headline: 14 roles filled in 48 hours
review1.quote: Pro-Tech filled 14 positions for us in under 48 hours during peak season. More important, the workers showed up and 9 converted full-time. That kind of consistency matters more than promises.
review1.name: Operations Director

review2.headline: Finally, an agency that vets workers
review2.quote: We'd been through agencies that kept sending unvetted workers. Pro-Tech was different. They understood the job, the shift, and what kind of person would actually work on our floor.
review2.name: HR Manager

review3.headline: Responsiveness that keeps production moving
review3.quote: The biggest difference is responsiveness. When something changes, I can call them and get a real answer fast. That saves my supervisors time and keeps production moving.
review3.name: Plant Manager

jobSeekers.headline:
Looking for work?
We place people fast.
jobSeekers.body: We work with companies across light industrial, electronics, warehouse, supply chain, and administrative environments. If you want steady work, weekly pay, and real opportunities to move into temp-to-hire or long-term roles, we can help.

ctaBand.headline:
Need workers fast?
Let's fill the role.
ctaBand.body1: Send us the role, shift, location, and start date. We'll move quickly and tell you what happens next.
ctaBand.body2: Industrial, electronics, warehouse, and supply chain staffing across six active markets.
